changelog: fix: startup restore loads session_state.json and filters ended sessions
feat: conference mode switch auto-creates talk folder without disconnecting participants
fix: tighten auto_pause guard and add timing_event endpoint test
feat: daemon auto-pauses at 6pm with 5:30pm warning and midnight session end
feat: redesign host sessions panel with START TALK, END TALK, FRAGILE CREATE state
feat: show session-paused overlay on participant page when session switches
feat: UUID resolution on WS connect — session_paused for paused-session participants
feat: add START TALK / END TALK daemon actions with state save/restore
feat: daemon writes session_state.json every 5s via /api/session/snapshot
feat: update daemon_state.json to {main, talk} schema with migration from old stack format
fix: clear debate_round_timer_started_at before conditional restore
feat: extend /api/session/sync to restore full session state on server restart
feat: add GET /api/session/snapshot for daemon persistence
feat: replace session_stack with session_main/session_talk in AppState
docs: fix missing code fence in session persistence plan
docs: add session folder persistence implementation plan
docs: finalize session folder persistence design spec
docs: add session folder persistence design spec
